type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Also editing parse()/_make_node() for trans_metadata (note/created/modified). Will implement additively and check git diff before finalizing to merge with your domain changes.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Implementing domain support now: adding domain var in parse() while-loop (intercepted like trimmed), new domain param appended to end of _make_node() signature, dgettext/dngettext helper functions and _install_callables() extension. Will keep edits localized and re-check file before each edit; ping me before you touch the while-loop or _make_node signature so we don't clobber.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added metadata dict in parse() while-loop (note/created/modified branch before 'expressions' handling), appended 'metadata: t.Optional[t.Dict[str,str]] = None' as last param to _make_node() signature, and set output_node.trans_metadata at the end before return. Your domain param can also append at end of _make_node signature after mine - just check current file state before editing since our changes may land in the same working tree.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Domain feature complete and verified (all 830 existing tests pass): parse() intercepts domain="literal" in the param while-loop, _make_node appends domain as last positional param generating dgettext/dngettext calls, _install_callables gained dgettext/dngettext params with automatic non-domain-aware fallback. Wrote patch.txt with git diff. Your metadata changes aren't in the working file yet on my end - please re-apply and confirm no clobbering of the domain param (last slot in _make_node) before you finalize your own patch.
